user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new travel request expense approvers, so that travel expense claims are routed for proper approval.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Request Expense Approvers screen; When I click Add new travel request expense approvers and define the approver(s) and applicability; Then the expense approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter expense approvers by Location, Department and Position, so that I can locate the relevant configuration quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Request Expense Approvers screen; When I select Location, Department or Position and click Search; Then the list shows only matching expense approver records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the expense approver filters, so that I can clear selections and see all records.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Travel Request Expense Approvers screen; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view and edit an expense approver's applicability, so that expense approval routing remains correct.
acceptance_criteria: Given an expense approver record exists; When I click View or Edit; Then I can review or update the approver(s) and applicability details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure expense approvers using the reporting manager hierarchy, so that expense claims escalate through the correct management levels.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring travel request expense approvers; When I select a reporting manager hierarchy and applicability; Then expense claims are routed through that hierarchy
